title: Generic Box
description: Create a simple Generic class that can hold any type of object.
problemStatement:
Generics make code flexible! Define a class `Box<T>` with a private field `T content`. Create a `Box<String>` in `main`, set its content to `"Gift"`, and print the content.

**Expected Output:** `Gift`.
hints: Use `<T>` after the class name to declare it as generic.
